'''Lurark''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Saffalore]], located in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planetary government was based in Lurark. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] known as [[Argenhald Base]] outside the city's perimeter.<ref name="XWING" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
